raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The climate resiliency package includes four bills aimed at revolutionizing California’s building and construction sector, which accounts for roughly 40% of the state's carbon emissions.",
    "Senate Bill 30 mandates that state buildings and assets achieve carbon-neutrality by 2035.",
    "Senate Bill 30 requires the state to divest from projects that are not zero emission by 2023.",
    "Beginning in 2022, all newly designed and constructed state buildings in California must be zero emission.",
    "Senate Bill 31 would develop new building decarbonization programs through the California Energy Commission and the Public Utilities Commission.",
    "Senate Bill 31 emphasizes providing opportunities for low-income customers in building decarbonization programs.",
    "Senate Bill 32 would require all cities and counties in California to update their General Plans to fully decarbonize their building stock.",
    "Silicon Valley has proven that decarbonized, all-electric buildings cost less to build, require less infrastructure, and provide more value to builders and customers.",
    "Over 40 cities and counties in California have updated their building codes to rely solely on clean energy."
  ]
}
```
